public_evidence: Each null contains 10,000 valid realizations with no failed realizations.
Observed and null statistics used the same declared weighting and selected-axis rules.
All tested fits converged and passed the declared comparison tolerance.
Axial-distance calculations were checked for antipodal symmetry.
Containment radii were calculated from 2,000 actual bootstrap centers.
The primary reference-compatible static-gravity residual was fixed before candidate comparison.
Preferred rotational roles and unordered principal-axis geometry were kept separate.
No blocking validation failed in publication closure.
